scenarios.expect: counters accrue and threshold unlocks gate; replay is deterministic
restored state with an unlock not justified by counters is rejected
an overspend that would go negative is rejected
a write to one profile never alters another
a large run-history round-trips with chained-digest integrity
a tampered history fails the integrity check
flow screens are reachable and accessibility options are present
dialogue advances and events fire deterministically from flags
a restored state with an unjustified fired event is rejected
a prior single-run save-profile-v0 migrates and round-trips; a single-run v1 store round-trips
